summary: Complete testing of Agent Terrain Search System. All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend Agent Terrain Dashboard fully functional with search, farmer details, audit trail, and proper not-found handling.
critical_code_review_comments: Agent Search API properly implements RBAC - cooperative/admin/field_agent types allowed, producteur/acheteur blocked
Zone-based filtering works - agents only see farmers in their cooperative/coverage area
Audit logging properly captures all search activities with timestamp, action, target phone, IP address for SSRTE/RGPD compliance
Frontend has proper data-testid attributes for all key elements enabling automated testing
Cooperative members fix verified: coop_id_query() helper correctly matches both string and ObjectId types, resolving previous 404 errors
seed_data_creation: Test searches created audit log entries
context_for_next_testing_agent: Agent Terrain Search system fully functional. Key APIs: /api/agent/search (phone search), /api/agent/farmer/{id}/details (full profile), /api/agent/dashboard/stats (usage stats), /api/agent/audit-logs (SSRTE compliance trail). Frontend at /agent/terrain shows search form, farmer results with parcels, full details view, and audit history. Known test farmer: Kouassi Yao Jean, phone 0701234567, with 2 parcels (Gagnoa Nord 1.8ha, Gagnoa Centre 2.5ha). Cooperative members API fix verified - /api/cooperative/members now correctly returns full_name and phone_number, and /api/cooperative/members/{id} no longer returns 404.

features_verified.GET /api/agent/search?phone=X: PASS - Returns farmer data with parcels when found, proper error for invalid format
features_verified.GET /api/agent/farmer/{id}/details: PASS - Returns full profile with parcels, harvests, ssrte_visits
features_verified.GET /api/agent/dashboard/stats: PASS - Returns total_searches, total_views, farmers_in_zone, agent info
features_verified.GET /api/agent/audit-logs: PASS - Returns paginated audit logs with action, timestamp, target
features_verified.GET /api/cooperative/members: PASS - Returns members with full_name and phone_number populated (fix verified)
features_verified.GET /api/cooperative/members/{id}: PASS - Returns member details (no more 404 error - fix verified)
features_verified.RBAC Access Control: PASS - Cooperative and admin users have access, unauthenticated requests blocked
features_verified.Frontend /agent/terrain: PASS - Dashboard renders with search form, results, full details view
features_verified.Frontend Search: PASS - Searching 0701234567 shows farmer 'Kouassi Yao Jean' with 2 parcels
features_verified.Frontend Not Found: PASS - Non-existent phone shows proper 'Aucun planteur trouvé' message
features_verified.Frontend Audit Trail: PASS - Recent access history displayed with action indicators
features_verified.Phone Normalization: PASS - Both local (0701234567) and international (+2250701234567) formats work

coop_id_query helper.description: The coop_id_query() helper in cooperative.py now correctly matches coop_id as both string AND ObjectId, resolving the issue where member queries returned no results due to type mismatch

cooperative members full_name/phone_numb.description: GET /api/cooperative/members now returns properly populated full_name and phone_number fields (previously returned None)

cooperative member details 404.description: GET /api/cooperative/members/{member_id} now returns member details correctly (previously returned 404)

rca_of_the_issue: The main bug was that coop_id was stored as ObjectId in some documents but compared as string in queries, causing member lookups to fail. The fix added a coop_id_query() helper function that creates a $or query matching both string and ObjectId representations. This pattern is used in get_coop_members, get_member_details, validate_member, add_member_parcel, and get_member_parcels endpoints.
